ddls:
CREATE TABLE "genomic_variations" (
  "variation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genomic variation */,
  "chrom" TEXT /* Chromosome number where the variation occurs */,
  "pos" INTEGER /* Position of the variation on the chromosome */,
  "ref" TEXT /* Reference base at the position */,
  "alt" TEXT /* Alternate base at the position */,
  "cov" INTEGER /* Coverage of the variation */,
  "callability" TEXT /* Callability of the variation */,
  "data_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data type (SNP, indel, etc.) */,
  "quality_score" INTEGER /* Quality score of the variation data */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sample the variation belongs to */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the variation belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("variation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_genomic_variations_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_genomic_variations_data_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_type_id") REFERENCES genomic_data_types ("data_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_genomic_variations_chrom FOREIGN KEY ("chrom") REFERENCES chromosomes ("chrom_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "chromosomes" (
  "chrom_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each chromosome */,
  "chrom_name" TEXT /* Name of the chromosome */,
  "length" INTEGER /* Length of the chromosome */,
  "centromere_start" INTEGER /* Starting position of the centromere */,
  "centromere_end" INTEGER /* Ending position of the centromere */,
  "description" TEXT /* Additional information about the chromosome */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("chrom_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reference_sequences" (
  "ref_seq_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reference sequence */,
  "chrom_id" INTEGER /* ID of the chromosome the sequence belongs to */,
  "sequence" TEXT /* Reference sequence */,
  "assembly_version" TEXT /* Version of the genome assembly */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the reference sequence */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ref_seq_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reference_sequences_chrom_id FOREIGN KEY ("chrom_id") REFERENCES chromosomes ("chrom_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alternate_sequences" (
  "alt_seq_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alternate sequence */,
  "variation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genomic variation the sequence belongs to */,
  "sequence" TEXT /* Alternate sequence */,
  "quality_score" INTEGER /* Quality score of the alternate sequence data */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the alternate sequence data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alt_seq_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alternate_sequences_variation_id FOREIGN KEY ("variation_id") REFERENCES genomic_variations ("variation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genomic_regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genomic region */,
  "chrom_id" INTEGER /* ID of the chromosome the region belongs to */,
  "start_pos" INTEGER /* Starting position of the region */,
  "end_pos" INTEGER /* Ending position of the region */,
  "region_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Additional information about the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_genomic_regions_chrom_id FOREIGN KEY ("chrom_id") REFERENCES chromosomes ("chrom_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coverage_data" (
  "coverage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coverage data point */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genomic region the data belongs to */,
  "coverage" INTEGER /* Coverage of the region */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sample the data was derived from */,
  "date_collected" TEXT /* Date when the data was collected */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coverage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coverage_data_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES genomic_regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "callability_data" (
  "callability_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each callability data point */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genomic region the data belongs to */,
  "callability" TEXT /* Callability of the region */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sample the data was derived from */,
  "date_collected" TEXT /* Date when the data was collected */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("callability_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_callability_data_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES genomic_regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution the researcher belongs to */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the researcher */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date when the researcher joined the institution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher accessing the data */,
  "variation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genomic variation being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_variation_id FOREIGN KEY ("variation_id") REFERENCES genomic_variations ("variation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaborations" (
  "collaboration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration */,
  "researcher_id1" INTEGER /* ID of the first researcher in the collaboration */,
  "researcher_id2" INTEGER /* ID of the second researcher in the collaboration */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the collaboration started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the collaboration ended */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaboration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_researcher_id2 FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id2") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_researcher_id1 FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id1") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the project started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the project is expected to end */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genomic_data_types" (
  "data_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data type */,
  "data_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the data type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genomic_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "variation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genomic variation the data belongs to */,
  "data_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data type */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the data point */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sample the data was derived from */,
  "date_collected" TEXT /* Date when the data was collected */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_genomic_data_variation_id FOREIGN KEY ("variation_id") REFERENCES genomic_variations ("variation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_genomic_data_data_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_type_id") REFERENCES genomic_data_types ("data_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genomic_region_sets" (
  "region_set_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region set */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the region set */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region set */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the region set was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the region set was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_set_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genomic_region_set_members" (
  "member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each member */,
  "region_set_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region set the member belongs to */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genomic region */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date when the region was added to the set */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_genomic_region_set_members_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES genomic_regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_genomic_region_set_members_region_set_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_set_id") REFERENCES genomic_region_sets ("region_set_id")
)
